notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer flies out to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski walks. Michael Harris II scores. Jorge Mateo to 3rd. Dominic Smith to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ronald Acuña Jr. grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Ronald Acuña Jr. hits a grand slam (3) to left center field. Jorge Mateo scores. Dominic Smith scores. Mike Yastrzemski scores.
